voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường muốn khóc. Nhưng 4.9% não không đủ để điều khiển tuyến lệ. Mắt anh khô. Cổ họng khô. Chỉ có mũi — sống mũi — đau nhói. Huyết áp dồn lên thái dương. Hai hàm răng siết chặt.
voice_adherence.fix: The body-before-emotion principle is stated but feels mechanical here — like a checklist being ticked. The passage should be more visceral and less diagrammatic. Cut the explicit percentage reference and let the body failure speak for itself: 'Cổ họng khóa. Mắt khô. Sống mũi đau nhói — phản xạ cuối của cơ thể khi muốn khóc nhưng không còn nước.'
voice_adherence.note: The voice largely succeeds in its cold, surgical tone. The technical vocabulary wells are used effectively (ping, Hz, buffer, ghi đè). Sentence rhythm varies between clipped action beats and longer sensory passages. The weakest moments are where the voice becomes self-conscious about its own rules rather than embodying them naturally.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Cường gõ. Một lệnh. Hai lệnh. Mười lệnh. Trăm lệnh. sudo dd if=/dev/urandom of=/dev/hemera-buffer [...] Mỗi lệnh gửi hàng nghìn gói tin rác vào bộ đệm.
beat_coverage.fix: The overloading sequence is narratively flat — a list of commands followed by percentage counters. Dramatize the physical experience: the heat of the server, the smell of burning electronics, the way Cường's hands feel as he types, the sound of the quạt spinning up. Make the reader feel the system dying rather than just reading progress bars.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats from the outline are present but unevenly executed. Beat 1 (overloading) is the weakest — it reads like a technical procedure rather than a lived moment. Beat 3 (Lan's smile and 'Cảm ơn anh') is the strongest and most emotionally earned. Beat 4 (disconnect and shock) is visceral but somewhat repetitive with the previous chapter's ending.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Anh là người buông tay. Và buông tay — đôi khi — là cách duy nhất để giữ.
character_voice.fix: This reads like a generic inspirational quote, not Cường's voice. His voice is technical, clipped, avoids sentiment. Replace with something that sounds like him: 'Anh buông tay. Đơn giản. Xóa. Ghi đè. Không còn gì để nắm.' Or let the action speak without the philosophical gloss.
character_voice.note: Cường's internal monologue is mostly well-differentiated — the counting, the technical framing, the emotional flatness. Lan's single line 'Cảm ơn anh' works because it's brief and the narration earns it through context. The weakest point is when Cường's voice slips into generic reflective protagonist mode.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: Từ xa. Rất xa. Cách đây 1.2 km, qua lớp bê tông và nhựa đường và cáp quang đã đứt, anh nghe — hoặc tưởng mình nghe — một nhịp đập. 8 nhịp/phút.
plants_seeded.fix: This is explicit sequel-baiting rather than organic foreshadowing. If Lan thật's status matters, weave it in earlier and more subtly — perhaps Cường notices the 8 bpm during the overloading sequence, or the narrative mentions it once without the detailed speculation about her future.
plants_seeded.note: The outline says 'Không có' for gieo mầm, but the chapter adds significant sequel hooks: Lan thật's 8 nhịp/phút, the 12.7% chance, Bà Lành and Bác sĩ Tuấn mentioned by name. These feel tacked on rather than earned. The vết bầm resolution is the strongest plant-payoff — it works because it was established early and resolves naturally.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cái này là thiêu. Từ bên trong. Từ giữa não, lan ra. Như ai đó đổ axit vào giữa đầu và để nó ăn mòn xuyên ra hai bên thái dương.
prose_quality.fix: The 'Không — [X] là từ dành cho [Y]. Cái này [Z]' structure appears three times in this chapter. It's a effective device once, repetitive three times. Cut at least two instances. Here, simplify: 'Thiêu. Từ giữa não, lan ra hai bên thái dương. Axit đổ vào giữa đầu.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Vết bầm — dấu ấn vật lý duy nhất của sự tồn tại cô trong thế giới thực — đã mất. Khi cô được giải phóng, nó cũng mất. Như một lời xác nhận: cô không còn ở đây. Cô không còn trong hệ thống. Cô không còn trong anh.
prose_quality.note: The prose is generally strong with good sentence variety. Specificity is high (18°C, 52 nhịp/phút, 4.9%). The main issues are: the repeated 'Không — [redefinition]' structure (3 times), some paragraphs that could be cut without loss (the mảnh giấy note adds little), and a tendency toward over-explanation at emotional peaks.

continuity.weakest_moment: The chapter retcons the previous chapter's ending. Previous: Cường is already in darkness, não 95.1%, co giật ngừng, ý thức tắt. This chapter: Cường is standing in the hầm, looking at screens, typing commands, then re-experiences the gác xép collapse.
continuity.fix: Either: (1) Revise the previous chapter's ending to leave Cường conscious and mobile, or (2) Restructure this chapter to begin with Cường already having executed the commands (in a fugue state) and waking to the aftermath. The current version creates a jarring discontinuity.
continuity.note: The emotional continuity is strong — Cường's determination to ensure Lan's freedom follows logically from the previous chapter. But the physical/plot continuity is broken. The previous chapter ends with his consciousness shutting down ('Rồi tắt'); this chapter opens with him standing and typing. This is a significant structural problem.

violations: The note reads 'Tôi đã giết Lan' — but Lan is Bệnh nhân số 4, still alive at 8 bpm. Cường didn't kill her body, he freed her consciousness. The note's wording is inaccurate to the situation.

Previous chapter states não tổn thương reached 95.1% before Cường's consciousness shut down. This chapter has him functioning at 95.1% — typing complex commands, experiencing detailed sensory input. The 4.9% comparison to goldfish and cockroaches, while vivid, strains credulity for someone performing precise technical operations.
canon_compliance.note: Most canon facts are respected: hầm Haymarket details, buồng triệt giác, ping speeds, vết bầm history, Lan's 8 bpm, 1.2 km distance to St. Vincent. The '852 lần đổ bộ' matches the previous chapter. No family references appear. The violations are logical rather than factual.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: sudo rm -rf /hemera/buffer/* [...] sudo dd if=/dev/urandom of=/dev/hemera-buffer [...] while true; do echo "0000000000000000" >> /buffer/override; done
lore_integration.fix: The technical commands are appropriate for the character and world, but they're presented as a visual list rather than integrated into prose. Weave them into Cường's physical experience: 'Ngón tay tìm lệnh xóa. Gõ. Gõ tiếp. Một chuỗi ghi đè — urandom, zero, override — từng lệnh là một viên đạn vào bộ đệm.'
lore_integration.note: The Neural Mantle system does real work here — the buffer concept, the ghi đè mechanic, the sốc ngược risk. The world isn't just set dressing. The strongest integration is the vết bầm disappearing when Lan is freed — this uses the magic system's rules (đồng bộ hai chiều) to create emotional payoff.

engagement.weakest_moment: The entire first section (before Cường sits down at the keyboard) is re-establishing information the reader already knows from the previous chapter: the vết sẹo is cold, the server is offline, tổn thương não is 95.1%. This is a pacing problem — the chapter should hit the ground running.
engagement.fix: Open with Cường's hand on the keyboard, not on his chest. Weave the status information (tổn thương, server offline) into the action rather than front-loading it. Let the reader discover the situation as Cường acts, not before.
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from the gác xép collapse sequence and Lan's final smile — these are genuinely moving. But the pacing drags in the first third (re-establishment) and the last third (repetitive lying-on-floor reflections). The middle section — the overloading and the final encounter — is compelling.

three_weakest_sentences: Cái này là thiêu. Từ bên trong. Từ giữa não, lan ra. Như ai đó đổ axit vào giữa đầu và để nó ăn mòn xuyên ra hai bên thái dương.
Anh là người buông tay. Và buông tay — đôi khi — là cách duy nhất để giữ.
Đủ để nhớ cô. Không đủ để nhớ tại sao.
three_strongest_sentences: Vết bầm — dấu ấn vật lý duy nhất của sự tồn tại cô trong thế giới thực — đã mất. Khi cô được giải phóng, nó cũng mất.
Nụ cười này méo. Méo một chút ở khóe miệng phải. Mắt cô nhăn — không phải nhăn giả, nhăn thật, cơ mặt co lại theo phản xạ tự nhiên.
Cô không cần anh cứu. Cô đã được giải phóng [...] Phần còn lại trong căn gác xép — hình hài đang đứng trước anh — chỉ là bóng ma. Tàn dư. Dữ liệu rác trong bộ đệm chưa được ghi đè.
ai_patterns_detected: Repeated rhetorical structure: 'Không — [redefinition]' appears 3 times (vỡ/thiêu/tan biến). Effective once, AI-tell when repeated.
Uniform paragraph rhythm in the final section — many single-line paragraphs ending with periods, creating a monotone cadence.
The philosophical reflection 'buông tay — đôi khi — là cách duy nhất để giữ' reads like AI-generated inspirational closure.
Percentage-counting tension building (12%... 27%... 41%... 58%) is a common AI pacing device.
The ending's symmetrical structure (his heartbeat slowing, her heartbeat waiting, the space between) is too neat — real endings are lumpier.
top_3_revisions: Fix the continuity break with the previous chapter: either revise the previous chapter's ending to leave Cường conscious, or restructure this chapter so the overloading happened during a fugue state and Cường wakes to the aftermath. The current version has him conscious and mobile after the previous chapter established his consciousness shutting down.

Cut the repetitive 'Không — [redefinition]' structure to a single use (recommend keeping the first one about 'vỡ'). Replace the others with direct statement. Also cut the mảnh giấy note — it adds sentiment without earning it and the 'Tôi đã giết Lan' line is factually wrong.

Compress the opening re-establishment section and the extended lying-on-floor ending. The chapter should open closer to the action (Cường at the keyboard) and end sooner after the vết bầm discovery. The final reflections on Lan thật, Bà Lành, Bác sĩ Tuấn read as sequel-baiting — trust the reader to wonder without spelling it out.
new_canon_entries: Cường executed a complete buffer overwrite using multiple commands (rm -rf, dd urandom, ping flood, zero fill) to ensure no data recovery was possible.

The vết bầm (bruise shaped like lips) on Cường's ribs disappeared completely when Lan's consciousness was freed — confirming the đồng bộ hai chiều connection severs when the linked consciousness is deleted.
Cường wrote a note before the final action: 'Tôi là Trần Cường. Tôi đã giết Lan. Đây là sự chuộc lỗi.'
Cường's heartbeat stabilized at 52 bpm after the final disconnect — slower than normal but alive.
The buffer overwrite triggered a 94% risk of sốc ngược, which Cường accepted by pressing Y.
